description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile storage cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The cabinet features a white body with light wood trim along the top and bottom edges, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The front side is equipped with two sliding doors, each with a small circular finger hole for easy access, and the doors appear to slide past each other to reveal the interior storage space. The sides and back are solid panels, with no visible openings or hardware, emphasizing its streamlined look. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing additional items or decor. This type of cabinet is commonly found in urban environments such as offices, waiting areas, garages, or public spaces for secure and organized storage.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with white panels, light wood trim, and sliding doors with finger holes. Its flat top and minimalist design make it suitable for urban storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding doors with circular finger holes and wood trim.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid white panel and wood trim, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Back view showing a plain, uninterrupted white panel framed by wood trim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid white panel and wood trim.
